subject: winston & strawn comment: consents to assignment

emails.subject: Re: Winston & Strawn Comment: Consents to Assignment
emails.subject_base: Winston & Strawn Comment: Consents to Assignment
emails.body: Kay, I have told Rob that we are not pushing GE for this point. WestLB is plenty protected without it. If GE gives a yes to the change on Monday Great! If no answer or answer is no we take what we have. Therefore, please log call into GE on Monday am and let them know we need an answer on Monday and would appreciate if they would accomodate us. Lisa Kay Mann 12/10/2000 02:25 PM
